user.title: Elaway
user.description: Paste your AMPECO refresh token. Your charger(s) are discovered automatically. The token is single-use and rotates on validation, so paste the current value — and don't run another tool/script that refreshes the same token.

error.invalid_auth: The refresh token was rejected. Paste the current, valid token.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Elaway API. Check connectivity and try again.
error.no_charge_point: No chargers were found on this account.
